name: ignite
explanation: Ignite is a JMXFetch-based integration: the spec inherits `init_config/jmx` and `instances/jmx`, with no Python check class — collection happens through JMXFetch using a shipped `metrics.yaml` MBean list. Per the procedure rubric, JMXFetch checks always need host + port and, in any production-shaped deployment, JMX authentication credentials (user/password) and likely SSL trust material. Credentials cannot be discovered from the wire.
notes: Pure JMXFetch integration — no .py check class beyond __init__/__about__. Same shape as activemq.
